extraction.one_line_summary: DUJARDIN Thomas attacked from early breakaway, dropped DELAPART on final ascent repetition of Kasen climb to win solo.
tactical_patterns: Dimension Data paced peloton hard enough to eliminate pure sprinters but deliberately allowed breakaway margin for Anag positioning.
Second passage of same climb (Kasen repetition) proved decisive selection point after first passage only thinned group.
AG2R secured stage placing via two-pronged tactic: mountain jersey rider DELAPART plus late descender LATOUR avoiding chase duty.

rider_signals.DUJARDIN Thomas: positive: won stage that mirrors his Tour de Suisse Malbun victory profile, confirming specialized talent on repetitive circuit climbs
rider_signals.DELAPART Axel: negative: cracked when DUJARDIN accelerated on second Kasen ascent despite surviving first passage, exposing repeatability weakness
rider_signals.LATOUR Pierre: positive: bridged from peloton on final descent for 4th place while teammates were forward, showing AG2R depth
rider_signals.KITTEL Marcel: negative: distanced before final circuits despite Dimension Data's controlled pace, suggesting poor form even for hilly opener standards
